premises.content: The bandgap of (FAPbI3)1-x(MAPbBr3)x is tunable by adjusting the molar ratio x, with absorption edge shifting from 840 nm (x=0) to shorter wavelengths as x increases
premises.label: bandgap_tunable

premises.content: FAPbI3 has a bandgap of 1.48 eV with absorption edge of 840 nm, narrower than MAPbI3 (1.5-1.6 eV, edge ~800 nm), enabling broader solar spectrum absorption
premises.label: fa_narrower_bandgap

premises.content: Incorporation of MAPbBr3 into FAPbI3 stabilizes the perovskite phase of FAPbI3 and prevents conversion to the non-perovskite delta-phase
premises.label: mapbbr3_stabilizes_fapbi3

premises.content: FAPbI3/MAPbBr3 mixed perovskite solar cells show negligible hysteresis in J-V curves compared to MAPbI3-based cells, due to better balance of electron and hole transport
premises.label: negligible_hysteresis

premises.content: The mixed FAPbI3/MAPbBr3 composition shows improved thermal stability compared to pure FAPbI3, with the perovskite phase remaining stable at 100C annealing temperature
premises.label: thermal_stability_improved
